claims.summary: The 0.70 steep-gradient constant may be a discontinuous noise jump.
claims.disposition: Verified 0.70 is a gradient boundary; noise remains smoothstep-bounded between 0.06 and 0.12.

claims.summary: Dynamic-noise pressure coupling may already affect live ESN steps.
claims.disposition: Verified calculate_dynamic_noise is tested but not wired into ESN::step, so it currently has no live effect.

claims.summary: The full pressure-gradient surface should be inspected for steep regions.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline numeric sweep of the dormant helper with continuity and bound assertions.

claims.summary: Smoothing or enabling dynamic noise could make the substrate more receptive.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because wiring or tuning noise changes live ESN reservoir dynamics.
